subject: Cannot login to my account
body:
Hi TechCorp Support,

I've been trying to log in to my account for the past hour but keep getting an error message saying 'Invalid credentials'. I'm sure I'm using the correct password. I've tried resetting my password twice but I'm not receiving the reset email.

Can you please help me regain access to my account?

Thanks,
John Smith

subject: Billing question about Pro plan
body:
Hello,

I recently upgraded to the Pro plan but I was charged twice for this month. My credit card shows two charges of $49.99 each on March 10th.

Could you please look into this and issue a refund for the duplicate charge?

My account email is sarah.j@company.com.

Best regards,
Sarah Johnson

subject: API rate limit increase request
body:
Hi there,

We're building an integration with your API and we're hitting the rate limit pretty quickly during our testing. Our current plan allows 100 requests per minute, but we need at least 500 for our use case.

What are the options for increasing our rate limit? We're on the Business plan.

Thanks!
Mike Chen
CTO, Startup.io
